# netbox_rir (Data Source)

Fetches a Regional Internet Registry (RIR) from NetBox by name or slug.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the RIR to look up.
- `slug` (String) The slug of the RIR to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the RIR.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the RIR.
